about.heading: about
about.introHeading: Built around honest work and clean results
about.introBody: Best Landscaping Co was started to give homeowners a straightforward landscaping partner: clear communication, dependable scheduling, and outdoor work that looks sharp when the crew leaves.

history.heading: Our History
history.body: What began as small residential yard projects grew into a landscaping company trusted for irrigation, planting, hardscape, retaining wall, and lawn care work across Utah County. The company has stayed intentionally local so every project can get careful attention from first walkthrough to final cleanup.

owner.heading: Meet the Owner
owner.name: Owner Operated
owner.body: The owner stays close to the work, reviewing details, communicating expectations, and making sure each property is treated with respect. That hands-on approach keeps the company practical, accountable, and focused on doing the job right.

items.title: Clear Communication
items.body: You should know what is happening, when it is happening, and what comes next.

items.title: Respect for Property
items.body: Clean work areas, careful crews, and finished spaces that feel ready to use.

items.title: Practical Solutions
items.body: Recommendations are based on what fits the property, budget, and long-term upkeep.

standards.heading: Our Standards
items: Show up prepared and ready to work.
Use durable materials suited for Utah conditions.
Keep details clean, level, and finished.
Leave every project site orderly at the end of the day.

services.heading: Utah Landscaping Services
services.body: From full landscape installs to irrigation upgrades and retaining wall work, we build outdoor spaces that are clean, functional, and built to last. Here is how we can improve the look and performance of your property.

form.heading: Start Your Project
form.body: Tell us what you need and we will get back to you with a clear next step.

footer.body: Reliable outdoor work, clean execution, and straightforward service for properties across Utah County.
footer.copyright: Best Landscaping Co. All rights reserved.

aboutSection.heading: About Our Services
aboutSection.body: Best Landscaping Co is dedicated to providing top-notch agricultural contracting services. With a focus on plowing, planting, harvesting, and maintenance, we ensure fast and efficient solutions to boost farm productivity. Our commitment is to deliver quality services at competitive prices, making us the preferred choice for all agricultural needs.

items.title: Landscaping
items.body: We design and install polished front and backyard spaces with fresh planting, defined edging, and clean hardscape details.
items.imageAlt: Modern residential landscaping with a stone walkway and planted beds

items.title: Full Sprinkler System Installation
items.body: Get efficient irrigation coverage that keeps lawns and planting beds healthy without the constant hassle of manual watering.
items.imageAlt: Lawn sprinkler watering a green yard

items.title: Sprinkler Repair
items.body: We diagnose leaks, damaged heads, and worn irrigation lines to keep your system running smoothly through the season.
items.imageAlt: Technician repairing sprinkler irrigation near a garden bed

items.title: Block Retaining Walls
items.body: Add structure and usable grade changes with durable block retaining walls installed for both strength and curb appeal.
items.imageAlt: Contractor building a block retaining wall

items.title: Rock Retaining Walls
items.body: Create a more natural look with stone retaining walls that blend into the landscape while managing elevation cleanly.
items.imageAlt: Natural stone retaining wall with stairs beside a landscaped yard

items.title: Garden & Lawn Care
items.body: Keep your property looking sharp with healthy turf, vibrant flower beds, and consistent seasonal maintenance.
items.imageAlt: Colorful garden bed beside a manicured green lawn

items.quote: Best Landscaping Co exceeded my expectations with their speed and precision in preparing our fields. The whole crew was reliable from start to finish.
items.name: John Doe

items.quote: I highly recommend Best Landscaping Co for their exceptional planting services. They helped us stay on schedule and made the entire process easier.
items.name: Emily Smith

items.quote: Fast, reliable, and professional. Best Landscaping Co brought real attention to detail and handled our harvest work without any issues.
items.name: David Brown
